description_long: This is a large, single-story log cabin with a dark, multi-gabled roof and extensive wooden log construction. The structure features a prominent covered entryway supported by thick timber columns, and the roof extends outward to create deep overhangs for weather protection. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed along the visible facades, providing natural light and views. The cabin sits on a raised platform or foundation, and the exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving it a rustic and robust appearance. There is a visible porch area at the front, partially sheltered by the roof, and the overall design emphasizes both durability and comfort. The architectural style and materials suggest a blend of traditional log cabin aesthetics with modern residential scale.
description: A large, rustic log cabin with a dark, multi-gabled roof, prominent timber columns, and a covered porch entry. The exterior features horizontally stacked logs and multiple windows for a cozy yet spacious appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main covered entryway, timber columns, and the deep roof overhang above the porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the cabin, the multi-gabled roof structure, and the layered rooflines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a secondary entrance, and the extended log construction along the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch area, timber supports, and the open space beneath the roof overhang.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled roof with deep overhangs, constructed from dark asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically along the front and rear facades, with some grouped and others spaced apart, providing a mix of single and paired window arrangements.
attribute_door_placement: A main exterior door is centered on the front facade beneath the covered porch, with a possible secondary door visible on the rear side.
